title: scrophularia minima
intro: Scrophularia minima, also known as the small figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Scrophularia minima include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Scrophularia minima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, or topical creams, making it a versatile remedy in traditional folk medicine.
